title: YunSCM 2Pcs Self-Sealing 20 inch Fat Bike Inner Tubes AV32mm Schrader Valve Automatic Repair Puncture Resistant Tube Compatible Fat Bicycle Tyre Inner Tube
features: 🚵‍♀️【SIZE】 AV32mm (Regular valves). Compatible with 20x1.75/1.90/1.95/2.0/2.10/2.125 bike tire tubes
🚵‍♀️【MORE DURABLE】 Designed specifically to stop tube punctures from ruining your ride and keep you going

‍♀️【Environmentally friendly】 Non-toxic, non-corrosive and non-hazardous, Non-flammable, Water soluble.ete flat. Hassle free to replace your old tire 🚵‍tubes within minutes which is time saving and efficient.

【Easy To USE 】The Self Sealing Bike Inner Tube is a self-repair for some small holes or very fine cracks. For example, after a long time, some places will leak air quietly, accidentally hit nails and other problems, which are easy to repair. It is worth noting that our self-repairing inner tube can be used within the normal temperature environment and cold days -15 ℃ , and it is more conducive to travel in cold weather.

🚵‍♀️【Please note】 1. Because the Self Sealing fluid is flowing, in order to prevent the liquid from flowing out during operation, please do not concentrate the center of gravity or the liquid near the air nozzle when pumping up.

🚵‍♀️【Safe Bike Tires】 Pre-installed with Sealant to provide maximum puncture protection and prevent flat tires on your bike.The self-repairing inner tube is a thicker design, which is more durable than the normal inner tower. The bicycle inner tube rolls through the tire repair liquid to automatically fill the punctured area. After testing, the leak can be repaired within 5~8 seconds under normal conditions.
description: Product Description PRINCIPLE During riding, when the inner tube is punctured, the self-replenishing fluid in the inner tube is ejected from the punctured hole at the pressure of the outer air. The self-replenishing fluid condenses rapidly at the puncture hole, blocking the puncture hole, thereby preventing the tire burst phenomenon in the riding process.
